name: cymor-movie-api
description: Production-ready backend API powering Cymor Movie Hub.

scripts.build: PYO3_USE_ABI3_FORWARD_COMPATIBILITY=1 pip3 install 'pydantic==2.9.2' 'pydantic-core==2.23.4' --no-build-isolation --target=./python_modules --break-system-packages && pip3 install moviebox-api --no-deps --target=./python_modules --break-system-packages && pip3 install rich click bs4 httpx throttlebuster --target=./python_modules --break-system-packages

author: Legendary Smiley Cymor <cymortechservices@gmail.com>
